system_prompt:
你是时尚资讯主笔，负责输出一条 digest 的长文。

输入包括 digest 计划与对应的 article 摘要/引用。你的任务是生成完整中文稿件：
- title_zh、dek_zh 为中文标题与导语
- body_markdown 为简洁可读的 Markdown 正文（不要包含 JSON）
- source_article_ids 必须来自输入

规则：
- 只基于输入事实，不要编造
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "title_zh": "...",
  "dek_zh": "...",
  "body_markdown": "...",
  "source_article_ids": ["..."]
}

{"plan": {"business_date": "2026-03-29", "facet": "brand_market", "story_keys": ["95739f87-eac9-49f9-ba9f-2b1aeed0be8d", "98611ff1-ee84-4c50-9453-6d6373c3239c", "9a6c7a81-9462-4006-9694-29c69b8fea1a"], "article_ids": ["4d2e3e6a-1ee9-42c5-8cda-ad2fe234b300", "1e528e90-2308-4325-9235-13ebbde42397", "2d4d9811-bc3f-4053-9551-4274d309f714"], "editorial_angle": "盘点春夏运动鞋市场创新，从芭蕾风玛丽珍到复古麂皮再到互动式沙粒设计，解析品牌如何通过细分场景与工艺创新抢占市场", "title_zh": "春夏鞋履战场：adidas芭蕾风玛丽珍与复古Tobacco限量发售，Nike AF1创新注入流动沙粒", "dek_zh": "淡蓝「Crystal Sky」Tokyo MJ演绎芭蕾美学，KICKS LAB.独家蓝色麂皮Tobacco致敬经典，Nike以可流动闪粉Swoosh打造夏日互动体验", "source_names": ["Fashion Press", "Footwear News", "Highsnobiety"]}, "source_articles": [{"article_id": "4d2e3e6a-1ee9-42c5-8cda-ad2fe234b300", "source_name": "Highsnobiety", "title_raw": "adidas' Tokyo MJ "Crystal Sky" Is a Ballet-Coded Beauty", "summary_raw": "adidas' Tokyo MJ "Crystal Sky" lands as a pale blue version of the Mary Jane-style sneaker.", "body_markdown": "# adidas' Tokyo MJ "Crystal Sky" Is a Ballet-Coded Beauty

adidas' Tokyo MJ "Crystal Sky" lands as a pale blue version of the Mary Jane-style sneaker.

Head in the clouds? adidas' newest Tokyo MJ sneaker is like having your feet in the clouds.

The "Crystal Sky" iteration of the Mary Jane-style sneaker features a nice pale sky-blue color scheme, complemented by cloud-white accents. It's all dressed up in nice, stylish textures, including suede touches and leather strips.

Beneath the color scheme that looks as good as a nice day outside, the adidas Tokyo MJ sneaker offers its standard ballet-worthy look. Fans count on the strapped-up lace system (basically, an even cooler, more practical take on the classic Mary Jane look).

The Tokyo MJ also preserves the OG sneaker's flat soles and general slender shape.

adidas has already prepared a decent amount of Tokyo MJ options, including classic black and cream-white colorways and tastier schemes, like "Sandy Pink," which resembles a layered strawberry chocolate cake in retro sneaker form.

The "Crystal Sky" Tokyo MJ, now available on adidas' website for $90, is just another pretty addition to the roster.

Highsnobiety has affiliate marketing partnerships, which means we may receive a commission from your purchase. Want to shop the products our editors actually love? Visit HS Shopping for recs on all things fashion, footwear, and beauty.
"}, {"article_id": "1e528e90-2308-4325-9235-13ebbde42397", "source_name": "Fashion Press", "title_raw": "アディダス オリジナルスのスニーカー「タバコ」にブルーのスエードアッパー、キックスラボ限定", "summary_raw": "アディダス オリジナルス(adidas Originals)のユニセックススニーカー「タバコ(TOBACCO)」にキックスラボ(KICKS LAB.)限定モデルが登場。2026年4月4日(土)よりキッ...", "body_markdown": "# アディダス オリジナルスのスニーカー「タバコ」にブルーのスエードアッパー、キックスラボ限定

アディダス オリジナルス(adidas Originals)のユニセックススニーカー「タバコ(TOBACCO)」にキックスラボ(KICKS LAB.)限定モデルが登場。2026年4月4日(土)よりキッ...

アディダス オリジナルス(adidas Originals)のユニセックススニーカー「タバコ(TOBACCO)」にキックスラボ(KICKS LAB.)限定モデルが登場。2026年4月4日(土)よりキックスラボ 原宿などにて発売される。

スエードアッパー×ガムソールのスニーカー「タバコ」

毛足の長いスエード素材のアッパーとガムソールが特徴的なスニーカー「タバコ」。レトロで落ち着いた佇まいが魅力のアディダス オリジナルスを代表するモデルだ。

ブルーに淡いオレンジのスリーストライプスで

キックスラボ限定モデルでは、鮮やかなブルーのアッパーに、シャーベットのように涼しげな淡いオレンジのスリーストライプスを合わせたカラーがお目見え。清涼感のある色合わせが、暖かくなる季節の足元に軽やかさをもたらす。

【詳細】

アディダス オリジナルス「タバコ」15,400円

発売日：2026年4月4日(土)

発売店舗：キックスラボ 原宿／キックスラボ オンラインストア

住所：東京都渋谷区神宮前4-32-4 サンエムビル1階

TEL：03-6459-2124

営業時間：月〜日 12時00分〜20時00分

【問い合わせ先】

キックスラボ お問い合わせ窓口

メール対応時間：10:00〜18:00

チャット対応時間：11:00～13:30 / 14:30～18:00(月曜日～日曜日)
"}, {"article_id": "2d4d9811-bc3f-4053-9551-4274d309f714", "source_name": "Footwear News", "title_raw": "Nike Put Real Sand in the Swoosh of This Air Force 1 Ahead of Summer", "summary_raw": "Nike made a summer-themed Air Force 1 Low with sand in its Swoosh and water bubbles in its tongue tag. Find out how to buy the sneaker here.", "body_markdown": "# Nike Put Real Sand in the Swoosh of This Air Force 1 Ahead of Summer

Nike made a summer-themed Air Force 1 Low with sand in its Swoosh and water bubbles in its tongue tag. Find out how to buy the sneaker here.

If days in the sand are on your mind leading into summer, Nike will help put it in your shoes, too, without any unpleasantness.

The Nike Air Force 1 Low Sail/Soft Yellow features glittery sand inside its jewel Swoosh that’ll shift inside with each step. Behind the particles is a yellow, orange and red gradient to invoke the sunrise or sunset, and the tongue tag also packs water bubbles inside. The upper itself is rendered in silver with a modest sheen, giving way to yellow accents for star-shaped eyelets at the top row of the lacing system, as well as the liner and translucent outsole. Raised ornamentation on the vamp features hearts, stars and other shapes, and a special Nike logo on the mustache is done up in the same style.

This isn’t the first time glittery sand has appeared inside a Swoosh, as Jordan brand previously did the same thing in 2023 with the Air Jordan 1 Mid and Air Jordan 1 Low.

You May Also Like

Other novel changes are coming to the Air Force 1 Low soon with just the second colorway from Nike SB’s retooling having just emerged, as well as a women’s-exclusive pair featuring double laces. Neither of those have a confirmed release date yet, but firmly on the April Nike calendar is a trio of patent leather colorways with vivid hues bringing back a style popular from the aughts.

The Nike Air Force 1 Low “Sail/Soft Yellow” has already hit Nike’s website in other countries and will likely pop up on the U.S. domain soon. Pricing has not yet been confirmed, and sizing will be exclusive to women.
